code:
import io
import string

let t_line = io.read_line()
match t_line
when Some(t)
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(body, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if start < i
          let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
          if tok == t
            count = count + 1
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
    when None
      start = start
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
when None
  println("count=0")
end
